requirement_topic.en: Mandatory MEPS and star energy label under Malaysia appliance policy
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚冰箱MEPS与星级能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞冰箱MEPS與星級能效標籤

summary.en: Malaysia applies household-appliance minimum-energy-performance and labelling expectations for refrigerators through ST governance. Export models must be assessed against Malaysia energy policy thresholds and declared with Malaysia-facing star labelling before market placement. SIRIM is used as the national technical path for certification and market-facing evidence preparation where applicable.
summary.zh: 马来西亚依据ST监管要求对冰箱实行最低能效绩效与标签要求。出口机型在进入马来西亚前应按马来西亚门槛进行能效核验，并提供面向马来西亚的星级能效标识文件。SIRIM可作为国家技术路径用于证据准备与认证。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞依據ST監管要求對冰箱實施最低能效表現與標籤要求。出口機型在進入馬來西亞前應按馬來西亞門檻進行能效核驗，並提供面向馬來西亞的星級能效標識文件。SIRIM可作為國家技術路徑用於證據準備與認證。

standards_or_laws: ST governance for household appliance energy performance and energy labelling in Malaysia
SIRIM energy compliance evidence process for appliances

summary.en: China applies its own household-refrigerator energy regime under GB 12021.2 and related MIIT/SAMR administrative files. Chinese classes and declarations are calculated under China-specific methodologies and are not accepted as Malaysia star-label evidence without Malaysia-facing recalculation and regulator-linked submission.
summary.zh: 中国按GB 12021.2及相关MIIT/SAMR能效体系实施家用冰箱能效管理。中国能效等级与标签采用中国方法体系，与马来西亚星级标签并非一体化，可通过局部指标对齐实现参考，但不能直接替代。
summary.zht: 中國按GB 12021.2及相關MIIT/SAMR能效體系實施家用冰箱能效管理。中國能效等級與標籤採用中國方法體系，與馬來西亞星級標籤並非同一體系，可透過局部指標對齊作參考，但不能直接替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Household refrigerator energy grading and labelling in China

gap.en: Exporters must not map China energy labels into Malaysia. They need Malaysia-facing measurement and declaration packets, including unit model rating alignment, label class mapping, and SIRIM-linked filing references. A model with valid China GB energy paperwork can still fail Malaysia placement without compliant Malaysia MEPS framing.
gap.zh: 出口商不能将中国能效标签直接套用于马来西亚。需要单独建立面向马来西亚的测算与声明包，包括机型等级映射、标识类别和SIRIM提交路径。具备中国GB能效文件的机型，如未按马来西亚框架重整，仍可能无法在马来西亚放行。
gap.zht: 出口商不能將中國能效標籤直接套用於馬來西亞。需要單獨建立面向馬來西亞的測算與聲明包，包括機型等級映射、標識類別和SIRIM提交路徑。具備中國GB能效文件的機型，如未按馬來西亞框架重整，仍可能無法在馬來西亞放行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Malaysia-facing MEPS and energy-label filing is required before market placement for controlled household refrigerators.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China — GB 12021.2-based labelling applies for Chinese domestic sale, but not destination acceptance in Malaysia.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Malaysia requires destination-grade energy evidence even when China labelling is complete. Treat GB 12021.2 as a technical reference only and produce a Malaysia-facing MEPS and star-label package with model declarations and supporting test basis accepted by SIRIM or the relevant Malaysian regulator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使中国能效文件完整，马来西亚仍要求目的地能效证据包。应将GB 12021.2仅当技术参考，按马来西亚MEPS和星级标签机制形成机型级声明与支撑报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使中國能效文件完整，馬來西亞仍要求目的地能效證據包。應將GB 12021.2僅作為技術參考，按馬來西亞MEPS和星級標籤機制形成機型級聲明與支撐報告。

requirement_topic.en: Malaysia supply and frequency adaptation to 240 V / 50 Hz

summary.en: Malaysia uses a 240 V, 50 Hz electrical environment for household deployment. Export models for Malaysia should document compatibility, test limits, and user-safe operation at this voltage/frequency point before placement, including manual statements and nameplate data.
summary.zh: 马来西亚家用/商用部署采用240V、50Hz供电环境。面向马来西亚出口的机型需提供240V、50Hz条件下的兼容性和安全性文件，包括说明书与铭牌数据声明。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞家用或商用部署採用240V、50Hz供電環境。面向馬來西亞出口的機型需提供240V、50Hz條件下的相容性與安全性文件，包括說明書與銘牌數據聲明。

standards_or_laws: MS IEC 60038 electrical system nominal-voltage harmonization context for Malaysia supply
Product voltage and frequency declaration requirements in Malaysia-facing documentation

summary.en: China domestic and regional exports are often documented around 220 V / 380 V or regional configurations while maintaining 50 Hz. Chinese electrical rating blocks do not automatically produce Malaysia-ready acceptance for market filing because the destination documentation model, service settings, and utility expectations differ.
summary.zh: 中国内销及周边出口常见文件依据220V、380V等组合并保持50Hz。中国电气参数文件并不能直接用于马来西亚准入，因目的地文件结构、售后服务设定与实用要求不同。
summary.zht: 中國內銷及周邊出口常見文件依據220V、380V等組合並保持50Hz。中國電氣參數文件並不能直接用于馬來西亞准入，因目的地文件結構、售後服務設定與實用要求不同。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB/T electrical rating practices used in Chinese domestic documentation
China domestic test and declaration conventions for household refrigeration

gap.en: Practical impact is mainly document realignment rather than mandatory redesign for most models. Exporters should prepare Malaysia-specific compatibility annexes for power input, thermostat setpoints, protection trip settings, and user-facing voltage-frequency statements, especially for single-phase and coastal-warehouse logistics destinations.
gap.zh: 对许多型号，实际差距主要是资料重排而非必然重设计。出口商应单独准备面向马来西亚的功率输入、温控整定、保护动作点和电压频率声明附件，并确保文档与最终入关节点一致。
gap.zht: 對許多型號，實際差距主要是資料重排而非必然重設計。出口商應單獨準備面向馬來西亞的功率輸入、溫控整定、保護動作點和電壓頻率聲明附件，並確保文件與最終入關節點一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when documentation is submitted for Malaysian placement, including explicit 240 V, 50 Hz suitability statement and corresponding labelling.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China market channels as applicable, but not accepted for Malaysia market placement without destination-focused alignment.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The voltage/frequency delta is a practical documentation gate. Treat 240 V and 50 Hz declarations as Malaysia-first compliance evidence and do not rely on China-only 220/380 V blocks for market acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电压频率差异主要是文件闭环门槛。应按马来西亚需求确认240V、50Hz适配声明，不能用中国单一220/380V文件直接做为马来西亚市场依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電壓頻率差異主要是文件閉環門檻。應按馬來西亞需求確認240V、50Hz適配聲明，不能用中國單一220/380V文件直接作為馬來西亞市場依據。
